source: NOAA Global Historical Climatology Network - Daily (GHCN-D)

queries.query: weather stations with maximum temperature exceeding 86 degrees Fahrenheit
stations where minimum temperature dropped below freezing (32°F) in the month
monthly observations with average high temperatures between 59°F and 77°F (mild climate)
stations that received more than 2 inches of rainfall in a month
weather records showing single-day precipitation over 1 inch
monthly records with maximum average wind speed above 15 miles per hour
stations with more than 5 inches of snowfall accumulation
winter months with temperatures below 23°F and significant snowfall over 2 inches
